mapper.insert:
SELECT baemin_sales_seq.nextval FROM dual
INSERT INTO baemin_sales (baemin_delivery_id, upload_id, year_month, delivery_type, order_amount, service_fee, coupon_discount, delivery_cost, payment_fee, vat) VALUES (#{baeminDeliveryId}, #{uploadId}, #{yearMonth}, #{deliveryType}, #{orderAmount}, #{serviceFee}, #{couponDiscount}, #{deliveryCost}, #{paymentFee}, #{vat})
